content.boundary: Applies to individual 6-/8-year gimnázium institutions' admissions practices and outreach programs; excludes changes to the statutory grade-span structure, the national exam design itself (distinct from T3), and vocational-track content per scope.
content.change_lever: School-level and maintainer-level quota/outreach mandates layered onto existing admissions infrastructure, funded via targeted (not general) finance instruments.
content.name: Targeted quota and outreach expansion for disadvantaged access to existing tracks
content.system_problem: Hungary's elite selective schools concentrate top performers among already-advantaged backgrounds (14% of top readers from advantaged families vs 1% from deprived backgrounds), and access depends substantially on private tutoring rather than raw ability alone despite identical public per-pupil financing.
